description.en: Turn saved programmes into a personal checklist with deadlines, materials, and progress.
description.zh: 把收藏项目整理成个人清单，统一跟踪截止日期、申请材料和完成进度。

description.en: Compare saved programmes by application dates, location, applicant group, and source coverage.
description.zh: 按申请日期、地区、适用人群和来源覆盖情况对比收藏项目。

description.en: Choose saved programmes and receive reminders before their verified deadlines.
description.zh: 选择收藏项目，在已核验截止日期前收到提醒。
